items.name: hyper-text
items.title: Hyper Text
items.description: A text component that scrambles letters before revealing the final text on hover or load.

items.name: text-animate
items.title: Text Animate
items.description: Versatile text animation component with multiple animation types and split modes.

items.name: true-focus
items.title: True Focus
items.description: A text component that highlights words in sequence with a glowing focus effect.

items.name: scroll-based-velocity
items.title: Scroll Based Velocity
items.description: Text that scrolls horizontally with velocity based on scroll speed.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: A moving gradient beam that travels along the border of its container.

items.name: noise-texture
items.title: Noise Texture
items.description: A canvas-based noise texture overlay for adding grain and texture to backgrounds.

items.name: shimmer-button
items.title: Shimmer Button
items.description: A button with a shimmer/shine animation effect.

items.name: interactive-hover-button
items.title: Interactive Hover Button
items.description: A button with an interactive hover state that reveals a secondary layer.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card that follows the cursor with a spotlight glow effect.

items.name: showcase-card
items.title: Showcase Card
items.description: A card with 3D tilt effect that responds to mouse movement.

items.name: matrix-rain
items.title: Matrix Rain
items.description: The iconic Matrix digital rain effect rendered on canvas.

items.name: pixel-canvas
items.title: Pixel Canvas
items.description: An interactive pixel grid that responds to mouse movement.

items.name: testimonial-marquee
items.title: Testimonial Marquee
items.description: An infinite scrolling marquee of testimonial cards.

items.name: magnet-lines
items.title: Magnet Lines
items.description: Lines that bend toward the cursor like a magnetic field.

items.name: liquid-blob
items.title: Liquid Blob
items.description: A morphing liquid blob that follows the cursor.

items.name: dither-gradient
items.title: Dither Gradient
items.description: A dithered gradient effect rendered on canvas.

items.name: particle-galaxy
items.title: Particle Galaxy
items.description: A swirling 3D particle galaxy effect that responds to mouse movement.

items.name: node-diagram
items.title: Node Diagram
items.description: An animated node diagram with glowing data pulses flowing through connections.

items.name: auth-modal
items.title: Auth Modal
items.description: An animated authentication modal with sign in and sign up tabs.

items.name: command-menu
items.title: Command Menu
items.description: A spotlight-style command palette with keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: flight-status-card
items.title: Flight Status Card
items.description: An animated card displaying real-time flight information.

items.name: github-calendar
items.title: GitHub Calendar
items.description: A GitHub-style contribution heatmap calendar.

items.name: magnetic-dock
items.title: Magnetic Dock
items.description: A macOS-style dock with magnetic hover magnification effect.

items.name: collection-surfer
items.title: Collection Surfer
items.description: A scroll-driven card carousel with parallax depth and momentum-based navigation.

items.name: hero-geometric
items.title: Hero Geometric
items.description: A dithered geometric gradient hero section powered by Three.js shaders with simplex noise and Bayer dithering.

items.name: dither-prism-hero
items.title: Dither Prism Hero
items.description: A prismatic dithered hero section with advanced WebGL shaders featuring ordered dithering, holographic iridescence, and floating particles.

items.name: webgl-liquid
items.title: WebGL Liquid
items.description: A premium liquid hero background powered by raw WebGL shaders, with configurable palette, grain, reveal timing, and flow behavior.

items.name: closing-plasma
items.title: Closing Plasma
items.description: A premium footer-ready plasma background with atmospheric noise and smooth pointer-driven flow.

items.name: pulsating-button
items.title: Pulsating Button
items.description: A button with a pulsating ring animation that draws attention.
